2025-26 Saint Mary's Gaels Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 27-6 (16-2, 1st in WCC MBB)

Coach: Randy Bennett

PS/G: 77.3 (138th of 365)

PA/G: 64.5 (7th of 365)

SRS: 17.07 (34th of 365)

SOS: 5.54 (88th of 365)

ORtg: 116.7 (48th of 365)

DRtg: 97.4 (16th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +25000

NCAA Tournament: (#7 seed in South)
Lost South First Round (63-50) versus #10 Texas A&M

  • WCC Reg Season Champ
